result.stdout:
Kaya.McpServer (kaya-mcp)
MCP stdio server for HTTP and gRPC invocation through Kaya explorers.

Usage:
  kaya-mcp [--api-url <url>] [--grpc-proxy-url <url>] [--config <path>]

Options:
  --api-url <url>          Override KAYA_API_BASE_URL
  --grpc-proxy-url <url>   Override KAYA_GRPC_PROXY_BASE_URL
  --signalr-debug-route    Override KAYA_SIGNALR_DEBUG_ROUTE
  --config <path>          Path to kaya.mcp.config.json
  -h, --help               Show this help and exit
